prompt_en: 64x64 pixel art seamless tile, rare rarity inventory slot background, cool blue and indigo tones #0f4a7a #1a3d5a with hints of pale silver #b8c5d6, crystalline structure pattern, subtle shimmer and mist effect, arcane energy visible, dark fantasy style, minimal pixel art flat design, mystical atmosphere, tileable repeating texture, no visible seams
negative_prompt: bright cyan, neon blue, oversaturated, photorealistic detail, realistic crystals, modern elements, excessive sparkle, golden accents, warm tones, gradient shading, busy patterns
style_notes: Rare = crystalline/arcane aesthetic. Blue-indigo palette references magical ice/arcane properties. Silver shimmer from style guide #b8c5d6. Crystals kept minimal and pixelated (not realistic). Cool tones reinforce mystical quality. Seamless tile requirement.
